ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] Compare and contrast [different interpretations](https://www.pbs.org/wgbh/masterpiece/specialfeatures/little-women-adaptations/) of the sisters in the movie adaptations: [1949](https://www.amazon.com/Little-Women-June-Allyson/dp/B001RY2JPM/ref=pd_sbs_d_sccl_1_6/141-0286031-2516342?pd_rd_w=8yG85&content-id=amzn1.sym.aa738fbd-ad05-4d11-aae2-04b598db6305&pf_rd_p=aa738fbd-ad05-4d11-aae2-04b598db6305&pf_rd_r=EVJYZYM3T0V290Y6S6BC&pd_rd_wg=A7W3k&pd_rd_r=f77cffda-a0bb-4228-8808-dc514c2668ee&pd_rd_i=B001RY2JPM&psc=1) Movie, [1994](https://www.amazon.com/Little-Women-Collectors-Claire-Danes/dp/0767851013/ref=sr_1_7?crid=3A5U4YLQEP1KY&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.rmZ96mz1eHhyjENB3qxFgu27YaXmILpHM7pGsfGvCakpPGN9cB2d4F4x4g8_CcnK-ziYZSvmrafnllZFdwm4IS3Lm6epEA9uXx0Fz2670DSz4M37YFG9NxbbWVEyrtsPuuGc6eu8zMJfInV8KyK2iC_EBR99HIpg06cZ_zg_odDkw0ff0TBgbFiftEFl8ptcBwCRr9mypuP2UoHbP2gT1KnFZd6DOSJwCGUD54Kc-90.PmFwnpTPVWZajTI33V-VAbwdsWyo1UvKGHAesWcBjUw&dib_tag=se&keywords=little+women+movie&qid=1778881612&sprefix=little+women+movi%2Caps%2C231&sr=8-7) Movie, [2018](https://www.amazon.com/Masterpiece-Little-Women-Emily-Watson/dp/B079ZV7961/ref=sr_1_8?crid=3A5U4YLQEP1KY&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.rmZ96mz1eHhyjENB3qxFgu27YaXmILpHM7pGsfGvCakpPGN9cB2d4F4x4g8_CcnK-ziYZSvmrafnllZFdwm4IS3Lm6epEA9uXx0Fz2670DSz4M37YFG9NxbbWVEyrtsPuuGc6eu8zMJfInV8KyK2iC_EBR99HIpg06cZ_zg_odDkw0ff0TBgbFiftEFl8ptckApt9AD77rXJAIxnhYA1fj6bkw6-L5BVgz_lb8CFphw.9fY1tnGhvOcvLiTDpc5lx-ovPbbGbggLcqQNObSy-JU&dib_tag=se&keywords=little+women+movie&qid=1778881779&sprefix=little+women+movi%2Caps%2C231&sr=8-8) Movie
[ ] [Learn Morse code](https://morse.withgoogle.com/learn/)
[ ] Learn about [The Concord Writers](https://historyofmassachusetts.org/concord-writers/), a famous group of writers in the 19th century.
[ ] [Lucy Maud Montgomery and Louisa May Alcott](https://www.anneofgreengables.com/blog-posts/lucy-maud-montgomery-and-louisa-may-alcott)
